channel.title: Culture on sasta sundar tikau
channel.description: Recent content in Culture on sasta sundar tikau

item.title: The Absorption Machine: How China Domesticated Foreign Ideas
item.description: China didn't just receive ideas from the Silk Road — it metabolized them. Buddhism became a different religion. Manichaeism survived only in China, disguised as folk Buddhism. A Central Asian lute became so Chinese that critics had to argue against its foreignness. What was the mechanism?

item.title: Every Saint Was First a Scandal — Kabir. Bulleh Shah. Ibn Arabi. Nusrat.
item.description: They crossed the hardest boundary in their tradition. Got rejected, accused, cut off. Then they died — and everyone claimed them.
